title: [trustless://eil] Vitalik Buterin - Why Trustlessness Now?
description:
One week after publishing the trustless manifesto (https://trustlessness.eth.limo/), Vitalik Buterin, co-founder of Ethereum, takes the stage to talk about trustlessness, its paramount importance and how easily it can be eroded.

Talk given during day 1 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
